Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Plaintiffs Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Paraskevi Batsikas, Esq. (415) 262-0096 THE OTTINGER FIRM, P.C. for Plaintiff.
David Sohn, Esq. 415-421-1300 Sohn Law Group for Defendant.

RULING - Hearing is held. Parties do not oppose. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ROBERT BARNARD'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for final approval of class action settlement" is granted. Hearing required.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)--

MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF ROBERT BARNARD'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Plaintiffs' unopposed "motion for preliminary approval of class action settlement" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
